source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A thermodynamic system is taken from state $a$ to state $c$ in \textbf{figure} along either path $abc$ or path $adc$. Along path $abc$, the work $W$ done by the system is 450~J. Along path $adc$, $W$ is 120~J. The internal energies of each of the four states shown in the figure are $U_a = 150~\text{J}$, $U_b = 240~\text{J}$, $U_c = 680~\text{J}$, and $U_d = 330~\text{J}$. Calculate the heat flow $Q$ for $ab$?
